use_cases: Displaying brand messaging with animated word-by-word text reveals on landing pages
Creating interactive hero sections with mouse-following gradient effects
Adding subtle hover glow and click ripple effects to increase user engagement
Serving as the main entry point for SaaS product marketing pages
Providing a sophisticated animated hero that captures user attention on first load
ai_summary: A sophisticated hero section component featuring animated word-by-word text reveals with staggered timing, mouse-following gradient effects, text hover glow interactions, and click ripple animations. Built with React hooks and vanilla DOM manipulation for performance. Uses warm earth-tone color palette creating an elegant, premium feel suitable for SaaS landing pages and product showcases.
